title: WpfHexEditor Format Definition (.whfmt) — v2
description: Schema for .whfmt v2 — legacy definitions that predate v3 fields (qualityMetrics, syntaxDefinition, technicalDetails, useCases). These files are accepted as-is by WhfmtVersionMigrator (ADR-038) and normalized to camelCase at runtime. Upgrade to v3.0 by adding the required v3 fields and updating $schema.
$comment: v2 files are fully valid at runtime via WhfmtVersionMigrator. PascalCase top-level keys (QualityMetrics, MimeTypes, Software, UseCases, TechnicalDetails) are deprecated aliases — accepted but normalized to camelCase. v2 files intentionally omit v3-exclusive fields.
